creator: kristinacors
caption: 90% of people have never heard of this travel hack…have you ever heard of this before?! #travelbuckletlist #travelhacks #traveltipsandhacks #luxurytravels #travelseries

transcription.text: I just found a hack to book luxury vacations for less and 90% of people don't even know it exists. And by the way it works for hotels and flights because you're literally taking over someone else's vacation. Let me explain. So imagine Bad Bunny books a non-refundable vacation in February but then he's getting asked to perform at the Super Bowl. He says yes and then all of a sudden he can no longer go on that vacation anymore. Normally the money he spent on vacation is gone but instead of losing thousands of dollars people can actually sell their reservation to someone else. There are websites like Spare Fare, Transfer Travel, Plans Change, and Rumor where people list hotel stays and trips they can't take. So here's how the travel hack works. Someone lists their non-refundable trip and they discount it because they want to recover some of the money. You put in a bid for that vacation. The seller can reject or accept your offer. If the seller accepts your offer you have 48 hours to send Spare Fare the money. The seller then transfers the reservation to your name. Then you take the trip and then the seller gets paid so there are no scams. By the way I'm Christina. I teach you how to travel in luxury almost free using travel hacks most people don't know about. So if you like this video check out the entire series down below and follow so you don't miss out on any other travel hacks like this.
